title: cyperus niveus var. tisserantii
intro: Cyperus niveus var. tisserantii, also known as snowflax sedge, is a variety of the Cyperus niveus plant, a perennial sedge species. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus niveus var. tisserantii include its potential to reduce swelling and fight off infections, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
